response:
best_ext = None
    best_strength = float('-inf')
    for ext in extensions:
        caps = sum(1 for ch in ext if ch.isupper())
        lows = sum(1 for ch in ext if ch.islower())
        strength = caps - lows
        if strength > best_strength:
            best_strength = strength
            best_ext = ext
    return f"{class_name}.{best_ext}"
